message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the expensive price range and should be in the north
The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the moderate price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 4 people and 4 nights starting from tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to norwich and should arrive by 15:30
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on saturday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
